author: mark
text:
stash artifact at `wip/bl-e802-stash` (commit 30f79c5) carries the Phase 1B-2 implementation, verified passing the four §14 conformance gates:

- `src/store_init_xdg.rs` (218 lines new): `pub fn init(from, stealth, tasks_dir)` per SPEC §3, §5, §6.4. Stealth writes clone.json + tasks_dir; non-stealth materializes `trackers/<enc-origin>/balls%2Ftasks/`, seeds `.balls/{tasks,repo.json,project.json}` on the orphan, commits, best-effort pushes. No git_init_commit on main (§14.19).
- `src/store.rs`: `pub fn state_repo()` accessor (test helpers need it); `Store::init_xdg` wrapper delegating to the new module; `Store::discover` no-git branch routes through `xdg_discover::try_open` for stealth resolve; `Store::load_config` grows the XDG branch that synthesizes a Config view from RepoJson + ProjectConfig (transitional shim — 1B-6 retires it).
- `src/lib.rs`: `mod store_init_xdg;`.
- `tests/conformance_xdg_init.rs` (286 lines): §14.1, §14.4, §14.15, half-§14.19. All four pass against the stash. Tests construct fresh clones with their own HOME and bypass the existing test-helper bl() (which set HOME from the per-thread tempdir at the time of the stash).

Apply: `git stash apply wip/bl-e802-stash` after 1B-1 lands, then keep only src/store_init_xdg.rs, src/lib.rs's mod line, the src/store.rs additions, and tests/conformance_xdg_init.rs. Leave src/commands/init.rs unchanged (1B-5).
